content:
[DATE_TIME]. Properties.
In the [LOCATION], we own and operate 23 manufacturing sites located in 17 different states. In addition, we own and operate 84 manufacturing sites in 37 other countries. Many of the domestic and international sites manufacture products for multiple businesses. Beauty products are manufactured at 24 of these locations; Grooming products at 19; Health Care products at 21; Fabric & Home Care products at 38; and Baby, Feminine & Family Care at [DATE_TIME]. We own our Corporate headquarters in [LOCATION], [LOCATION]. We own or lease our principal regional general offices in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION]. We own or lease our principal regional shared service centers in [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and the [LOCATION]. Management believes that the Company's sites are adequate to support the business and that the properties and equipment have been well maintained.
[DATE_TIME].
